title: bistorta major subsp. nitens
intro: Bistorta major subsp. nitens, also known as the shiny bistort, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Polygonaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which contain anthraquinones and other compounds with anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Bistorta major subsp. nitens include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of gastrointestinal issues, while also exhibiting antioxidant and immune-boosting properties. The herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by drying and processing its roots, which can then be used to create teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal purposes.
